covered_sentences: The weather was so hot that I could have gone naked, however, I did not want to go naked even though there was no one to see me.
I could not go naked because the sun was so strong they it would burn my skin.
I therefore made myself clothes, a hat and even an umbrella.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Single-panel composition, path/S-curve motion line organization; camera at medium distance, slightly low angle, positioned to the left of the protagonist on the jungle trail, looking along the path toward him; medium-wide shot showing the protagonist walking forward along the winding dirt trail through the jungle, dressed in full self-made gear, umbrella raised overhead.

Protagonist walks along the jungle trail with the self-made umbrella raised in his right hand, shading himself from the bright sunlight that breaks through the tree canopy; he wears his goatskin jacket, goatskin wide-brimmed hat, and goatskin trousers, leather-strap sandals; a thought-bubble off to his right shows a simple stick-figure silhouette with a red X through it (rejecting going naked).

Scene: island inland jungle, midday, intense tropical sunlight breaking through tree canopy in strong shafts, creating dappled light on the dirt trail; protagonist on the central winding path, jungle trees flanking both sides, path extends from lower-left foreground toward upper-right middle distance.

Intense warm tropical light, high contrast between sunlit patches and deep jungle shadow, green-gold color palette, bright sky glimpsed above the canopy.

Protagonist (island castaway version): brown short straight hair, short beard, goatskin wide-brimmed hat on head, goatskin short jacket, goatskin trousers, leather-strap sandals; he carries a large self-made umbrella (broad, roughly stitched from goatskin or large leaves with a wooden handle); protagonist occupies center-frame, head at roughly two-thirds panel height; nearby tree trunks clearly taller than him (tree trunks about 4-5 times his height); umbrella diameter roughly equal to his shoulder width.

STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Character appearance, clothing details, and scene layout strictly follow reference images; no self-added or modified details; character proportions consistent throughout. No Chinese text in image; no watermark; no extra figures; proportions natural; spatial relationships clear. No outer border on single-panel image. Scene fingerprint: tall jungle trees with dappled canopy light + winding dirt trail + dense tropical undergrowth on both sides, positions and forms unchanged. Protagonist (island version): hair color must not change, goatskin jacket must not be replaced, wide-brimmed hat must stay on head, short beard must not be removed. Proportion anchors: protagonist's head clearly below the lowest visible branches; tree trunks about 4-5 times his height; umbrella overhead roughly as wide as his shoulders. covered_sentences: I tried to make a boat or canoe with which to escape from the island.
For a clearer day, I could see the mainland.
It took me a long time to build the canoe.
When it was finished, it was too big for me to move.
I could not get it to the shore and so I left it where I had built it.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Three-panel horizontal strip composition; left panel: camera at medium distance, elevated angle looking down at the protagonist beside a half-built large canoe at the riverside clearing, axe in hand, early construction stage; center panel: camera further back, wide shot, protagonist straining to push the massive finished canoe, body leaning at full effort, canoe not moving; right panel: camera at medium distance, side view, protagonist walking away from the canoe with slumped shoulders, canoe remaining stranded far from the shore in the clearing background.

Left panel: protagonist chops at a large log with an axe, shavings scattered on the ground around him, expression focused and hopeful; center panel: protagonist pushes against the side of the completed canoe with both hands and one shoulder, feet dug into the earth, entire body angled in effort — canoe does not move; right panel: protagonist walks away from the canoe toward the riverbank, back to viewer, head slightly bowed; the large canoe sits stranded in the clearing, surrounded by tree stumps and wood chips.

Left panel scene: riverside clearing at the island, daytime, bright tropical light, large half-finished canoe at center, wood chips and tools scattered. Center panel scene: same clearing, daytime, finished large canoe visible in full, grass and earth ground. Right panel scene: same location, protagonist moving toward the river edge visible at right frame, unfinished background of trees and stumps.

Warm tropical daylight across all three panels; left panel bright and energetic; center panel strong direct light emphasizing effort; right panel slightly cooler as protagonist recedes.

Protagonist (island castaway version): brown short straight hair, short beard, goatskin wide-brimmed hat, goatskin jacket, goatskin trousers, leather-strap sandals; left panel — protagonist stands beside the canoe, head at roughly two-thirds panel height, canoe log roughly waist height; center panel — protagonist's body fills roughly center half of panel, canoe clearly much larger than him (canoe length about 3 times his height); right panel — protagonist walking away, full figure about half panel height. Canoe in center panel: length approximately 3 times protagonist's body height for scale reference.

covered_sentences: Later I made a smaller boat, but this was not large enough to take me to the mainland.
I used it to sail around my island.
My life continued in this way for many years.
It was an orderly life filled with work and the praise of god.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right split composition, 1:1 ratio; left panel: camera at medium-wide distance, slightly elevated from the riverbank, looking at the protagonist paddling a small canoe through the calm river mouth toward the open sea, S-curve water path visible; right panel: camera at medium distance, slightly elevated from a hillside vantage, looking down at the protagonist inside the fort camp, kneeling in prayer posture beside a wooden crate with a Bible open on it, warm afternoon light.

Left panel: protagonist kneels in the small canoe using a wooden paddle, guiding it through the river mouth toward the beach and sea; the canoe fits him with little room to spare, clearly much smaller than the previous failed large canoe; expression calm and contented; right panel: protagonist kneels on the earthen floor of the camp, hands clasped together on top of an open Bible resting on a wooden crate; expression peaceful and devoted.

Left panel scene: island river mouth (S9), daytime, bright tropical light, calm water reflecting sky, lush green vegetation on both banks, open sea visible in the right-middle distance. Left panel: bright midday tropical light, warm blue-green water tones, cheerful palette; right panel: warm amber afternoon light inside the camp, golden and settled.

covered_sentences: I was a king of of my island, my subjects were the goats.
The dog, the cats and some parrots I had tamed.
There were no rebels among my subjects.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Single-panel composition, central-focus organization with protagonist at center and animal companions arranged around him; camera at medium distance, slight low-angle, positioned slightly right of center, looking at the protagonist standing inside the fort camp surrounded by his animal subjects; wide medium shot.

Protagonist stands at center of the camp clearing with relaxed, amused posture; one arm gestures outward in a mock-regal presentation; to his right, a large tawny dog sits attentively; to his left, two orange-and-white tabby cats sit near a wooden crate; above on a fence post or crate edge, a bright green parrot perches; in the background, two or three goats graze near the palisade wall; protagonist's expression is warm and gently humorous, a quiet smile.

Scene: mature fort camp interior, bright midday light, earthen ground, wooden palisade fence in background with dense trees beyond it, storage boxes and tool rack visible at left frame, ladder leaning against the fence at right.

Bright warm midday light, cheerful and golden palette, the camp feels alive and settled.

Protagonist (island castaway version): brown short straight hair, short beard, goatskin wide-brimmed hat, goatskin short jacket, goatskin trousers, leather-strap sandals; protagonist occupies center-frame, head at roughly two-thirds of panel height; dog seated to his right, dog's shoulder height reaches protagonist's knee; cats to his left, each cat's shoulder height at protagonist's ankle level; parrot on post to upper-left, parrot body about the size of a thick book held upright; goats in background, goat back height roughly level with protagonist's waist. Door frame or palisade stake tops clearly above protagonist's head, confirming scale. Logically rendering two recognizable cats as both from C20 (the two cats). Only 4 recognizable animals plus protagonist in frame — within per-panel budget.
